channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘People are afraid’: Lebanese reeling after Israel’s devastating attacks
item.description: Fear and confusion grip Lebanon as Israeli strikes devastate the country and its place in the ceasefire is contested.

item.title: ‘Heinous crime’: Al Jazeera condemns Israeli killing of journalist
item.description: Al Jazeera has condemned Israel’s “heinous crime” after a drone strike killed journalist Mohammed Wishah in Gaza.

item.title: Netanyahu: A ‘ceasefire with Iran will not include Hezbollah’
item.description: Netanyahu says the US-Iran ceasefire “will not include Hezbollah,” in his first remarks after the ceasefire.

item.title: World reacts to ‘brutal’ Israeli attacks on Lebanon after US-Iran truce
item.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 254 people and wounded 1,165 others, according to Lebanon’s Civil Defence.

item.title: Iranians breathe a ‘ceasefire’ sigh of relief as all sides claim victory
item.description: Celebration and scepticism coexist in Tehran as ceasefire offers reprieve despite doubts about its durability.

item.title: White House says Trump’s ‘red line’ against Iran nuclear enrichment remains
item.description: Trump's spokesperson says Vice President JD Vance will lead US team for negotiations with Iran in Pakistan on Saturday.

item.title: Trump backs Israel, says Lebanon a ‘separate skirmish’ after ceasefire
item.description: After Israeli strikes on Beirut, Donald Trump said Lebanon isn’t included in the Iran ceasefire.

item.title: How Trump’s promise to ‘wipe out’ Iran could backfire on US power
item.description: The world counts down to Trump’s threats of destruction.

item.title: ‘A lot of work to do’ to reopen Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said more work is needed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: ‘Why my child?’: Yemen’s Taiz mourns sniper’s killing of teen
item.description: Yemeni child killed by suspected Houthi sniper while heading to school in Taiz sparks grief and outrage among locals.
